subcodes.first_line: O ye who are steadfast in the Cause of God! The world hath awakened and become aware, and East and West have become enlightened [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر امر الهی جهان بیدار و آگاه گشته و شرق و غرب هشیار شده نورانیت
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
